EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed the alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} reconfigured the alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} took in consideration the alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} manually changed the status of the alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The alarm "{object.name}" for entity "{datafield4}" changed its status to "{object.new_value}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
